organic.title: Senior Backend Engineer Jobs at Product Companies in Bangalore - Naukri
organic.snippet: 847 Senior Backend Engineer roles at Product companies in India. Avg requirements: 5+ years, strong system design, distributed systems experience, AWS/GCP, Java/Go/TypeScript. Salary range: ₹22-38 LPA. Top hiring: Razorpay, Cred, PhonePe, Swiggy, Zomato.
